channel.title: Seminar Schools — Toronto Festivals
channel.description: Festivals across Toronto and the GO Transit network.

item.title: Rodgers + Hammerstein's Cinderella (Shaw Festival 2026 holiday)
item.description: At Niagara-on-the-Lake (Shaw Festival).

item.title: A Year with Frog and Toad (Shaw Festival 2026 holiday)
item.description: At Niagara-on-the-Lake (Shaw Festival).

item.title: Mighty Niagara Film Fest 2026
item.description: At Select venues, Niagara region.

item.title: Sunday Best: An exhibition of Black style and self-fashioning
item.description: At Art Gallery of Ontario, 317 Dundas Street West.

item.title: Nuit Blanche Toronto 2026 (20th anniversary, 'Tomorrow's Memories')
item.description: 20th-anniversary edition. Theme: Tomorrow's Memories. 7 PM Oct 3 through 7 AM Oct 4.

item.title: Guelph Jazz Festival 2026
item.description: At Royal City Mission, St. George's Square, GCVI/GYMC, SILENCE, Guelph.

item.title: Supercrawl 2026 (17th edition)
item.description: 17th anniversary edition of the James Street North arts festival.

item.title: Toronto International Film Festival 2026 (TIFF, 51st)
item.description: 51st edition of TIFF.

item.title: Melissa Auf der Maur: My '90s Photographs
item.description: At Art Gallery of Ontario, 317 Dundas Street West.

item.title: AFROFEST 2026
item.description: Annual African music and cultural festival at Woodbine Park.

item.title: TD Kitchener Blues Festival 2026
item.description: 35+ bands on 4 stages over 4 days. Fundraising concert Aug 6.

item.title: Caribana Pan Alive / Closing Day
item.description: At Neilson Park, Scarborough, Toronto.

item.title: Caribana Grand Parade
item.description: Grand Parade 8 AM to 8 PM along Lakeshore.

item.title: Caribana King & Queen Showcase
item.description: At Lamport Stadium, 1155 King St W, Toronto.

item.title: SOS Fest (Summer Soca Festival) Mississauga 2026
item.description: At Multiple venues, Mississauga.

item.title: Toronto Caribbean Carnival 2026 (Caribana, 59th year)
item.description: North America's largest Caribbean carnival. 59th year. Grand Parade Aug 1.

item.title: BollywoodMonster Mashup 2026
item.description: Canada's largest Bollywood festival.

item.title: Hillside Festival 2026
item.description: Three-day music festival at Guelph Lake Island. Shuttle from Guelph downtown.

item.title: Hamilton Fringe Festival 2026
item.description: Hamilton Fringe Festival. Shows begin July 16.

item.title: Caribana Junior King & Queen Showcase
item.description: At Scarborough Town Centre, Toronto.

item.title: TD Salsa on St. Clair 2026
item.description: Toronto Latin Street Festival. Sat 11am-9:30pm, Sun 11am-8:30pm.

item.title: TD Festival of South Asia 2026 (24th edition)
item.description: At Gerrard India Bazaar, Gerrard St E between Coxwell & Glenside, Toronto.

item.title: Ibrahim Maalouf T.O.M.A. at Danforth Music Hall (Toronto Jazz Festival)
item.description: At Danforth Music Hall, 147 Danforth Ave, Toronto.

item.title: Hiromi's Sonicwonder at Koerner Hall (Toronto Jazz Festival)
item.description: At Koerner Hall, 273 Bloor St W, Toronto.

item.title: Mississauga Taco Fest 2026 (debut)
item.description: At Port Credit Memorial Park, Mississauga.

item.title: Norma Winstone with Atlantic Jazz Collective (Toronto Jazz Festival)
item.description: At Jazz Bistro, 251 Victoria St, Toronto.

item.title: Pride Toronto 2026 (45th anniversary, 'We Won't Stop')
item.description: 45th-anniversary edition. 8 stages, 300+ performers. Theme: We Won't Stop.

item.title: Emilie-Claire Barlow at Koerner Hall (Toronto Jazz Festival)
item.description: La plus belle saison with pianist François Richard.

item.title: Laila Biali at Jazz Bistro (Toronto Jazz Festival)
item.description: JUNO-winning vocalist Laila Biali with two-night stand at Jazz Bistro.

item.title: Toronto Jazz Festival 2026 (39th edition)
item.description: 10-day 39th-edition festival. Cassandra Wilson 30th-anniversary New Moon Daughter; Hiromi's Sonicwonder; Ibrahim Maalouf T.O.M.A.; Norma Winstone; Laila Biali; Emilie-Claire Barlow.

item.title: Caribana Official Launch 2026
item.description: Toronto Caribbean Carnival official 2026 kickoff with live performances. 2-8 PM.

item.title: Mississauga Halal Food Festival 2026
item.description: At Celebration Square, Mississauga.

item.title: NXNE Music Festival 2026 (31st edition)
item.description: 300+ artists across 30+ venues. Free FIFA viewing at Nathan Phillips Square.

item.title: Niagara Canada International Film Festival 2026
item.description: Two-day independent film festival at Greg Frewin Theatre in Niagara Falls.

item.title: Mississauga Polish Days 2026
item.description: At Celebration Square, Mississauga.

item.title: Luminato Festival 2026 (20th anniversary)
item.description: 20th anniversary edition. Theme: PLAY. 50+ events, 140+ performances, 1000+ artists. Longest Luminato in history.

item.title: imagineNATIVE Film + Media Arts Festival 2026 (in-person)
item.description: 26th edition. Indigenous film and media arts from 56 Nations across 20 countries. In-person June 2-7; online June 8-14.

item.title: The Impressionist Revolution: Monet to Matisse
item.description: At Art Gallery of Ontario, 317 Dundas Street West.

item.title: Funny Girl (Shaw Festival 2026)
item.description: Sara Farb as Fanny Brice; Qasim Khan as Nick Arnstein. Directed by Eda Holmes.

item.title: The Wind in the Willows (Shaw Festival 2026)
item.description: At Niagara-on-the-Lake (Shaw Festival).

item.title: Sleuth (Shaw Festival 2026)
item.description: At Court House Theatre, Niagara-on-the-Lake.

item.title: Jeeves & Wooster in Perfect Nonsense (Shaw Festival 2026, Canadian premiere)
item.description: At Court House Theatre, Niagara-on-the-Lake.

item.title: Amadeus (Shaw Festival 2026)
item.description: At Niagara-on-the-Lake (Shaw Festival).

item.title: One for the Pot (Shaw Festival 2026)
item.description: At Niagara-on-the-Lake (Shaw Festival).

item.title: Heartbreak House (Shaw Festival 2026)
item.description: At Niagara-on-the-Lake (Shaw Festival).

item.title: Ohio State Murders (Shaw Festival 2026)
item.description: At Niagara-on-the-Lake (Shaw Festival).

item.title: Sin Wai Kin: ESSENCE (CONTACT exhibition)
item.description: Solo exhibition by Sin Wai Kin (Turner Prize 2022 shortlist). Through mid-June via CONTACT Photography Festival.

item.title: April Hickox: Vantage Point – Passing
item.description: CONTACT-affiliated public window installation running through August 29.

item.title: Power Plant Spring/Summer 2026 Exhibition Program
item.description: At The Power Plant Contemporary Art Gallery, 231 Queens Quay West.

item.title: Game On! Exhibition
item.description: At Aga Khan Museum, 77 Wynford Drive.
